title: Shielding Material Comparison
summary: Sample planning record used to verify the second research-log page and frame a comparison of conductive shielding materials.
objective: Compare field attenuation across material, thickness, seam geometry, and source frequency using a fixed measurement arrangement.
apparatus: Signal source, field probe, reference fixture, interchangeable conductive samples, spacing guides, and instrumented enclosure.
observations: No experimental result is claimed in this test record. Its purpose is to exercise pagination with four published entries.
next: Remove or replace this sample after confirming the three-entry page limit and navigation behavior.

measurements.label: Controlled variables
measurements.value: Source level, frequency, probe position, enclosure geometry
